* He added 8 cards to his collection.  
* His collection now has 8 more cards.  
* The next day his dog ate half of his collection.  
* After the dog ate the cards, there were 46 left.  
* The dog ate 46 / 2 = 23 cards.  
* Keith originally had 46 + 23 = 69 cards.  
* The total number of cards Keith started with is 69.  
* The dog ate 23 cards from the collection.
